title: Buying Shoes 买鞋子
scene: 爸爸带儿子去鞋店买运动鞋。

lines.en: Hello, we need a pair of sports shoes for my son.
lines.zh: 你好，我需要给我儿子买一双运动鞋。

lines.en: Sure! What size does he wear?
I'm not sure. Can you measure my feet?
lines.zh: 我不确定。你能量一下我的脚吗？

lines.en: Of course. Step on this measuring tool, please.
lines.zh: 当然。请站到这个量脚器上。

lines.en: He wears size 36. We have several styles.
lines.zh: 他穿36码。我们有好几种款式。

lines.en: I like the blue and white ones! They look cool!
lines.zh: 我喜欢蓝白相间的！看起来很酷！

lines.en: Let me check. Are they comfortable, Jack?
Yes! They feel light and soft. I love them!
lines.zh: 舒服！感觉很轻很软。我喜欢！

lines.en: They're one hundred and twenty yuan. Today we have a ten percent discount.
lines.zh: 一百二十元。今天打九折。
